title: Fullstack Engineer, Generative AI (Frontend Focus)
description:
About Company

Cracken is a fast-growing Silicon Valley-based startup built
by elite nation-state and commercial operators who defended
critical cyber infrastructure during the war in Ukraine,
researched AI and cybersecurity at MIT and Kyiv Polytechnic,
and led teams at Apple, Google, Palo Alto Networks,
HackerOne, DIU, Comcast, HP, and more.

We tame Cracken, an AI Agent for Cybersecurity with human-
in-the-loop. Our flagship product, is an agentic AI copilot
drastically scaling cyber assessments for enterprises and
governments.

We are growing and seeking an extremely talented software
engineer to help us pioneer the future of cybersecurity.

Responsibilities

- Hands-on engineering and testing of the product in various
  capacities.
- Develop and maintain advanced frontend components with
  exceptional delivery standards.
- Implement scalable and secure frontend solutions for both
  SaaS and on-premise platforms, following industry best
  practices and coding standards.
- Continuously learn and adapt to new technologies and fields,
  remaining at the forefront of frontend development.
- Foundational understanding of AI/ML tools and frameworks,
  with the ability to integrate AI-powered features into
  front-end applications, including knowledge of model
  deployment, API integration, and real-time inference
  workflows.
- Stay updated with the latest in AI and AI Agents. Provide
  relevant insights to the team and integrate innovations.

Requirements

- 4+ years of experience building user-facing products and
  design systems.
- 5+ years of experience in Python (ideally, but we can
  consider less experienced engineers, who learn very
  quickly and are ready to work in the startup environment).
- Strong proficiency in ReactJS, JavaScript, CSS, HTML.
- Experience translating product ideas and design concepts
  into high-quality code.
- Deep understanding of design patterns, usability,
  accessibility, and responsiveness.
- Ability to own UI/UX from concept to implementation.
- Experience with Generative AI Agents will be a huge plus,
  specifically:

   — implementation of Generative AI Agents using Langchain
/ Haystack and others

   — implementation of RAG using LlamaIndex and other
Advanced RAG frameworks

   — evaluation of AI Agent Performance

   — integration of AI Agents into Existing Systems

Nice To Have

- Master’s or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, or
  related fields.
- Cybersecurity product background: worked on security-focused
  software or platforms.
- Contributions to AI / CS/ Cybersecurity research, blogs, or
  whitepapers showcasing expertise.
- Experience in developing or contributing to open-source
  developer tools or frameworks.

Why Cracken?

- Real-World Impact: Validated in nation-state operations and
  supported by internal research.
- Team's Unique Motivation & Expertise: Ukrainian-heavy
  international team with Ph.D.s, professors, and top-tier
  industry veterans, driven by intrinsic passion forged
  through exposure to the hardships of war.
- Impeccable Timing & Positioning: At the cutting edge of AI,
  cybersecurity, and autonomous systems, Cracken is best
  positioned to win the race against adversaries.

Ready to build what’s next in AI and cybersecurity? Send us
your portfolio, GitHub, or any product work you’re proud of
— and let’s talk.
responsibilities: Hands-on engineering and testing of the product in various capacities
Develop and maintain advanced frontend components with exceptional delivery standards
Implement scalable and secure frontend solutions for both SaaS and on-premise platforms
Integrate AI-powered features into front-end applications including model deployment, API integration, and real-time inference workflows
Stay updated with latest AI and AI Agents and provide relevant insights to the team
use_cases: AI copilot for scaling cyber assessments for enterprises and governments
Agentic AI system for cybersecurity with human-in-the-loop
Real-time AI-powered security analysis and response
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a frontend-focused Fullstack Engineer role that
builds UI components and integrates AI features into front-
end applications. While the role involves knowledge of AI
agents and RAG frameworks, the primary work is implementing
scalable frontend solutions and integrating AI-powered
features rather than directly building, training, or
deploying models.
